Your Fav Beiby
🌹   One Month Anniversary   🌹

To Mrs. Zawadi

The girl who waited five months... and somehow still thinks I'm worth it.

May 25, 2026

↓
Looking Ahead

Our One Year Journey

One month down, eleven more to go. And I want you to know — every single day with you feels like a gift. The talking stage taught us patience. This first month taught us trust. And I promise you, whatever comes next, we'll face it together. Here's to the long road ahead, my love.I love you so much.

When I was young, I fell in love. We used to hold hands, man, that was enough.

Our Vibe
😴

The Sleeping Queen

She can sleep through anything — earthquakes, my calls, probably the apocalypse. But somehow, she still has time to call me lazy? The math ain't mathing, Sylvia. 😂

VS
🛋️

The "Lazy" King

Apparently I'm lazy? Me? The guy who waited 5 months in the talking stage? If that's lazy, then I don't want to be energetic. She just loves roasting me. 😭

Our Memories

30 days of you 🌙
Our Story

How We Got Here

💬

January 2026

The talking stage begins. Little did we know it would be a 5-month journey of patience, laughter, and growing closer. She was probably sleeping through half our conversations. 😴

🌹

May 25, 2026

Officially official. The day Mrs. Zawadi became mine, and I became hers. Finally. (And yes, I was probably being "lazy" about making it official sooner 😂)

😳

The First Kiss

Let's just say... I was "in a state" and it was chaotic. She doesn't want to talk about it, but I smile about it every single day. The sleeping queen was wide awake for that one. 😂

🌊

The Misunderstanding

We hit a bump, but we fixed it. Because that's what we do. We communicate, we listen, we choose each other. Even when one of us is sleepy and the other is "lazy."

✨

25th June 2026

One month in. Thirty days of you. And I am already the luckiest person I know.

Since May 25, 2026
30Days
720Hours
43200Minutes

The best relationships don't happen overnight. They happen in the quiet moments, the patient waiting, the sleepy mornings, and the choice to keep showing up — even when someone calls you lazy.

— For Mrs. Zawadi
Why She Means Everything

What I Appreciate About You

👂

You Listen

In a world full of noise, you actually hear me. You listen to my rants, my dreams, my random thoughts — and you make me feel understood. Even when you're half asleep.

🤝

You Fight For Us

When we had that misunderstanding, you didn't walk away. We fixed it together. That's rare, and I don't take it for granted.

😂

You Roast Me

Calling me lazy? The audacity. But honestly? I love that you tease me. It means you're comfortable. It means we're real. Keep roasting me, Sleeping Beauty.

💫

You're Patient

Five months of talking stage? Only someone special would wait that long and still choose me. Your patience amazes me. (And your ability to nap anywhere.)

🌙

You're An Introvert

I love that you're quiet, thoughtful, and deep. You don't need the spotlight — you just need real connection, good sleep, and someone to call lazy. And I'm honored to be that for you.

❤️

You're Mine

At the end of the day, you're Mrs. Zawadi. The sleeping queen to my "lazy" king. And that fact alone makes me the luckiest person alive.

Beiby, I know I'm not perfect. I know I can be a lot sometimes (especially when intoxicated 😂). I know you think I'm lazy and I know you can sleep through a hurricane. But I promise you this — every single day, I will choose you. I will listen to you. I will laugh with you. I will wait for you, just like you waited for me. Here's to many more months of you sleeping and me being "lazy." I love you, Mrs. Zawadi. — Your Zawadi 💕

Happy One Month, Mrs. Zawadi

— Zawadi, June 25, 2026 ❤️
